description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow that builds and tests Monero across multiple platforms and toolchains. The workflow should trigger on push and pull request events, excluding documentation and README changes. It should use an ubuntu-latest environment with a custom container, and set up ccache and other build dependencies. The workflow should then use a matrix strategy to build and test Monero for multiple toolchains, including RISCV 64bit, ARM v7, ARM v8, i686 Linux, Win64, x86_64 Linux, Cross-Mac x86_64, Cross-Mac aarch64, x86_64 Freebsd, ARMv7 Android, and ARMv8 Android.
